title: rubus stohrii
intro: Rubus stohrii, also known as Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan strawberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family native to the Himalayas and other parts of Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Rubus stohrii include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting respiratory health, while also acting as an antiseptic to prevent infections. Rubus stohrii is commonly prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for its medicinal use.
